creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
The status report team is moving to a new workflow that will include the possibility to submit reports through Phabricator, as already discussed with doceng@. Thus I would like to ask, on behalf of the status reports team, the creation of two new groups on Phabricator:

- status-team: this is the group for the official members. At the moment this should include debdrup, pauamma and salvadore.

- status-reviewers: this is a group open to be joined by anyone who would like to review status reports. This should include the status-team members and grahamperrin.

Thanks.
